channel.title: Misc on SuperTsumu
channel.description: Recent content in Misc on SuperTsumu

item.title: ICTF_2022/Grep
item.description: Home Grep - 60 points - Misc Description Grab That Easy Flag Script Kiddie! Creator: Mohin Paramasivam The Writeup Figure 1: Quote by Ken Thompson In this challenge, we are given the file named “Readme”, which you can download here. According to my expert analysis, “Readme” is a file containing ±14 Kilobytes of ASCII text data. To read the raw data off the terminal, I used the unix command “cat” to print the data in the file:
